{{Infobox character
| name = Akura Charity
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Sage of the Silver Heart, mistress of the castle, Sage, Heart Sage
| abilities = manipulate a chisel with her finger, condensed sword aura, seven techniques of shadow and dreams, Archlord's power
| affiliations = Akura family, Mercy's family
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

''See also: [[Akura Charity Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Akura]] [[Charity]] is a prominent figure within the [[Akura clan]], holding the title of [[Sage of the Silver Heart]]. As a high-ranking member of this family, she possesses significant authority, acting as a spokesperson for the clan and humanity at large. She is described as having a calm, composed, and often impassive demeanor, frequently maintaining a cold or expressionless facial mask even in intense situations. Despite her youthful appearance and smooth voice, she carries herself with the confidence of an empress and has held the rank of [[Sage]] since before many current leaders were born. [[Charity]]'s role involves extensive political and strategic leadership. She manages clan affairs, directs important members, and oversees significant events such as the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament. Her influence extends to various kingdoms, where she has issued commands to emperors and addressed monarchs. She is known for her legendary passion for humanity and her resentment toward factions led by [[sacred beasts]]. While she can be a source of guidance and rewards for those who meet her expectations, the [[Akura clan]] is also noted for its immense reach, vast resources, and a tendency to act according to their own interests, sometimes involving the taking of prisoners or monitoring others. In addition to her leadership, [[Charity]] possesses significant personal assets, including ownership of the [[Night Wheel Valley]] and its [[vault]]. She is also a collector of [[natural treasures]]. Within her family, she is the granddaughter of [[Akura Malice]].}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|As the [[Sage of the Silver Heart]] and mistress of the castle, [[Akura]] [[Charity]] serves as a representative for both humanity and the [[Akura]] family. During her displays of power, she demonstrates the ability to manipulate a chisel using only her finger. This tool is further enhanced by a condensed [[sword aura]] that she maintains around it.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Akura Charity]] is the [[Sage of the Silver Heart]] and mistress of the castle.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Akura Charity]] speaks for the [[Akura]] family and humanity.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Akura Charity]] is a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Akura Charity]] can manipulate a chisel with her finger.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Akura Charity]] possesses a condensed [[sword aura]] around her chisel.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7" />}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|A member of the [[Akura]] family, [[Charity]] is a genius in the line of [[Malice]] who failed to activate the first book. She previously orchestrated conflict by pitting the [[Winter’s Blade sect]] against the [[Seishen Kingdom]] and carries the grief of a nephew who met a terrible [[fate]] at the hands of a brute. Clad in silken black robes marked with glowing violet script, she possesses the [[Book of the Silver Heart]], which contains seven techniques involving dreams and shadows. While holding a map and owning both the [[Night Wheel Valley]] and its [[vault]], she eventually stepped out of the shadows to announce a team.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Charity]] once pitted the [[Seishen Kingdom]] against the [[Winter’s Blade sect]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Charity]] has a nephew who met a horrible [[fate]] at the hands of a brute.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Charity]] possesses the [[Book of the Silver Heart]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c13">''Underlord'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Charity]]'s [[Book of the Silver Heart]] contains seven techniques of shadow and dreams.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Charity]] is part of the [[Akura]] family.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Charity]] owns the [[Night Wheel Valley]] and its [[vault]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c16">''Underlord'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Charity]] stepped out of the shadows in the [[Night Wheel Valley]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Charity]] has a map.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Charity]] would not hold deaths against anyone.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Charity]] is a genius in the line of [[Malice]] who failed to activate the first book.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Charity]]'s robes are silken black with glowing violet lines that look like script.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Charity]] announced a team.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Heart Sage]], known as [[Akura]] [[Charity]], materialized from the darkness within [[Lindon]]'s basement. Possessing the power of an [[Archlord]] and characterized by purple eyes, [[Charity]] stole the only young Underlords that held any value to [[Yerin]]. During these events, [[Charity]] provided [[Lindon]] with assurances that he would remain safe while inside the dungeon.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Charity]] assured [[Lindon]] he would be safe in the dungeon.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Charity]] materialized from darkness in the center of [[Lindon]]'s basement.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3">''Uncrowned'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Charity]] has purple eyes.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Charity]] possesses [[Archlord]]'s power.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Charity]] stole the only young Underlords worth anything to [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Charity]] is the [[Heart Sage]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Charity]] is part of [[Mercy]]'s family and is described as unknowable.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Charity]] is dressed like a peasant worker.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Dressed in [[sacred artist]] robes of black, white, and violet, [[Akura]] [[Charity]] is a [[Sage]] who attained her rank before the births of both [[Lindon]] and his father. During a period when her father was undergoing ascension, she faced the loss of his presence. Amidst these family shifts, she leveled accusations against the [[Kingdom]] of [[Seishen]], claiming they were involved in a conspiracy to assassinate members of the [[Akura head family]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura Charity]] wears black, white, and violet [[sacred artist]] robes.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura]] [[Charity's father]] is being lost.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura]] [[Charity's father]] is ascending.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura Charity]] accused the [[Kingdom]] of [[Seishen]] of conspiracy to assassinate members of the [[Akura head family]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3">''Bloodline'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura Charity]] was a [[Sage]] before [[Lindon]] or his father were born.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Akura Charity]] observed the [[Hollow King]] outside [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Akura Charity]] has a personal collection of [[natural treasures]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|“I was not aware you were in trouble,” the Heart Sage said stiffly.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“Kingdom of Seishen. You stand accused of conspiracy to assassinate members of the Akura head family.”<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
